meta.title: Referral Rewards — Earn $25 Per Referral | AWS Overseas
meta.description: Refer someone to AWS Overseas. When they ship, buy, or book any service, you earn $25 — paid straight to your wallet. No limit on how many times you can earn.

hero.title: Send a shipment their way. We'll send $25 your way.
hero.subtitle: Every person you bring to AWS Overseas who completes a shipment, purchase, or booking puts $25 in your wallet. Simple as that — no tiers, no caps, no waiting.

howItWorks.title: How the payout works
howItWorks.description: Three steps between sharing your code and seeing $25 land in your wallet.

steps.title: Share your code
steps.description: Every AWS Overseas account has a unique referral code. Send it to anyone shipping cargo, importing goods, or booking freight services.

steps.title: They complete anything, once
steps.description: A shipment, a product order, or any paid service booked under your code — the first one qualifies. It doesn't have to be a shipment specifically.

steps.title: $25 hits your wallet
steps.description: Once their order is confirmed and paid, we credit your AWS Overseas wallet automatically. Track it from your referrals dashboard.

items.title: Any paid order qualifies
items.description: A freight shipment, a marketplace product, or a booked service — if money changes hands, it counts toward your $25.

items.title: One reward per new customer
items.description: You earn $25 the first time someone you referred completes an order. It's about bringing new business in, not repeat purchases.

items.title: No cap on referrals
items.description: Refer 1 person or 100 — every one of them that converts pays out $25. There's no monthly limit.

items.title: Paid to your wallet
items.description: Rewards land in your AWS Overseas wallet, usable toward future shipments or withdrawable per your account settings.

withdrawal.title: Turning your wallet balance into cash
withdrawal.description: $25 lands in your AWS Overseas wallet the moment a referral's order is confirmed. From there, moving it to your bank account takes four steps.

steps.title: Add your bank details, once
steps.description: Save your account holder name, account number, IFSC code, and bank name under account settings. You only need to do this the first time.

steps.title: Request a withdrawal
steps.description: From your wallet, enter the amount you want to move out — anything from $25 up to your available balance — and submit the request.

steps.title: We review and approve it
steps.description: Our team checks the request against your saved bank details. You can track its status — pending, paid, or rejected — right from your wallet.

steps.title: It lands in your account
steps.description: Once approved, the amount is transferred directly to your bank account and your wallet balance updates to match.

withdrawal.note: No withdrawal fee, and no expiry on wallet balance — cash out $25 at a time or let it build up first.

cta.title: Your code is already waiting in your account
cta.description: Sign in to grab your referral code and start sharing — it takes less than a minute.

items.question: How much do I earn per referral?
items.answer: $25 for every person you refer who completes a paid shipment, product purchase, or service booking with AWS Overseas.

items.question: Does it have to be a shipment specifically?
items.answer: No. Any completed purchase counts — a freight shipment, a product order from our catalog, or any paid service. The first qualifying order from your referral is what triggers the reward.

items.question: Is there a limit to how much I can earn?
items.answer: No cap. Refer as many people as you want — each one who completes a qualifying order earns you another $25.

items.question: Where do I find my referral code?
items.answer: Sign in and open your profile — your unique code and referral activity are on your account dashboard.

items.question: When does the reward get credited?
items.answer: As soon as your referral's order is confirmed and paid, $25 is credited to your AWS Overseas wallet automatically.

items.question: Can I use my own referral code?
items.answer: No — referral rewards are for bringing new customers to AWS Overseas, not for orders on your own account.

homeSection.title: Refer a shipper. Earn $25.
homeSection.description: Know someone who imports, exports, or ships freight? Send them your code. The moment they complete their first order, $25 is yours.
